items.name: guidance-for-accelerator-optimized-agentic-bidding-on-aws
items.description: This Guidance demonstrates how to optimize real-time bidding decisions across multiple machine learning models by deploying GPU-accelerated NVIDIA model architectures that run in parallel within an ARTF-compliant framework.

items.name: mercury-explainability
items.description: mercury-explainability is a library with implementations of different state-of-the-art methods in the field of explainability. They are designed to work efficiently and to be easily integrated with the main Machine Learning frameworks.

items.name: bbm92-qkd-anomaly-detection
items.description: Developed a simulation framework and machine learning pipeline for detecting stealthy eavesdropping attacks in entanglement-based Quantum Key Distribution (QKD) systems. Designed a 24-dimensional physics-aware temporal feature set and evaluated XGBoost-based anomaly detection with SHAP interpretability.

items.name: scalable-mlops-infrastructure-ci-cd-framework-
items.description: Developed an end-to-end MLOps pipeline for continuous integration, deployment, and monitoring of machine learning models using AWS, Kubernetes, and open-source technologies, ensuring scalable, reproducible, and maintainable workflows.

items.name: awesome-machine-learning
items.description: A curated list of awesome Machine Learning frameworks, libraries and software.

items.name: ExplainableAIWithDiabetes
items.description: Hybrid Explainable AI framework for diabetes prediction combining ensemble machine learning, fuzzy logic, SHAP, and LIME. Delivers accurate risk assessment with transparent, human-interpretable explanations to support clinical decision-making and improve trust in healthcare AI systems.

items.name: CreditCardFraudDetection
items.description: An end-to-end Machine Learning system implementing a custom Random Forest ensemble framework to classify fraudulent credit card transactions.

items.name: Alternative-Credit-Scoring-System
items.description: An end-to-end machine learning project that develops an alternative credit scoring framework for Kenya's underserved population. Using engineered features inspired by M-Pesa, M-Shwari, employment, and housing data, the system predicts loan default risk and generates transparent credit scores with explainable reason codes.

items.name: Credit-Card-Fraud-Detection
items.description: An end-to-end Machine Learning system implementing a custom Random Forest ensemble framework from scratch (using NumPy) to classify fraudulent credit card transactions.

items.name: mohd-musheer.github.io

items.name: Neural-Network-From-Scratch
items.description: Implemented a feedforward neural network from scratch using Python and NumPy, including forward propagation, backpropagation, gradient descent, and training without machine-learning frameworks such as TensorFlow or PyTorch.

Includes a BeautifulSoup IPL web scraper, data analytics models for Titanic survival rates, a heart disease prediction engine with 85% accuracy, and a deep learning CNN image classification system deployed via a local Flask web application.

items.description: This desktop GUI tool helps non-expert users detect SQL-injection attacks. It uses a hybrid framework, combining Machine Learning and Deep Learning models. Generative AI (LLM like Gemini) provides a crucial second opinion on potential attacks. The tool handles text processing (Bag-of-Words) and allows live prediction.

items.description: P2P lending platforms require effective credit risk assessment to balance default risk against expected returns. Using ~410,000 historical loans from Bondora (2009-2024), this analysis develops a machine learning framework to predict loan defaults and optimize portfolio capital allocation strategies for investors operating under limited capital.

By learning circuit topology and fault propagation paths, it enables fast and scalable ATPG without traditional backtracking.

items.description: A  scikit-learn-inspired machine learning framework for the Swift language

items.description: A physics-guided machine learning framework that treats electrical conductivity as the primary prediction target, with viscosity and density modelled as coupled properties, and then uses the resulting surrogate models inside a multi-objective optimisation workflow to find DES compositions that combine favourable electrolyte characteristics.

items.name: BeanML
items.description: A framework for creating machine learning models.

items.name: Solar_Advisor

Includes work on recommendation systems, face embeddings, financial forecasting, and applied AI solutions built with Python, FastAPI, Django, and modern ML frameworks.

items.name: streamlit
items.description: Streamlit is an open-source Python framework that makes it easy to build and share beautiful, custom web apps for machine learning and data science. With Streamlit, you can turn data scripts into shareable web applications in minutes without needing front-end experience.

items.name: scalable-inference-serving
items.description: A collection of APIs, frameworks, and platforms for scalable machine learning model inference serving, deployment, and management.

items.name: amazon-emr
items.description: Amazon EMR is a cloud big data platform for running large-scale distributed data processing jobs, interactive SQL queries, and machine learning applications using open-source analytics frameworks such as Apache Spark, Apache Hive, Apache HBase, Apache Flink, Apache Hudi, and Presto.

items.name: SMART-HUNTER
items.description: This project is an Automated Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Scanning Framework. It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.

items.name: flowMagic
items.description: flowMagic is an R package for automated bivariate gating of flow cytometry (FCM) data. It uses a machine-learning model trained on both experts data and a large, high-quality FCM dataset generated by EVE Online players. The package also provides an extensive visualization toolkit and integrates seamlessly with the flowCore/flowWorkspace frameworks

items.name: CCDR
items.description: OpenCDR is an open-source platform for exploring, interpreting, and extending the Clinical Dementia Rating (CDR) framework through complete state-space analysis, probabilistic interpretation, and continuous monotonic machine-learning models.

items.name: sepsis-sentinel
items.description: SepsisSentinel: An advanced clinical data science and machine learning framework for the early detection and forecasting of sepsis utilizing clinical datasets. Built with scalable data pipelines and predictive modeling.

items.name: Amorphous-Polymer-Electrolyte-Machine-Learning
items.description: Predictive ML framework for modeling ionic conductivity and ion transport properties in amorphous polymer electrolytes. Uses SMILES-derived molecular fingerprints and descriptors as chemically informed features, with model interpretability and feature attribution analyses to surface materials design insights.

items.name: visionai-engine
items.description: VisionAI Engine is an intelligent image processing framework that enables object detection, image classification, and computer vision experimentation using modern machine learning techniques.
